title: Spot.io: Optimizing Cloud Infrastructure Through Secure Cost Aware Automation

description:
Spot.io's architect walks us through how they used AWS CloudFormation, IAM roles, EKS, Amazon Sagemaker and Amazon Aurora to build a SaaS platform that helps their customers automate a cost-effective cloud infrastructure deployment on AWS. The platform combines custom-made machine learning models, IAM roles, and Amazon EKS to analyze 2 billion data points from the Spot market and to manage 500 thousand nodes every day. This architecture allows them to securely deploy EC2 Spot instances in their customer’s environment, to predict spot instances interruptions 60 minutes in advance, and replace instances automatically.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS cloud: 
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Spot.io: Optimizing Cloud Infrastructure Through Secure Cost Aware Automation
